title: ToolTreaux 12 Pocket Heavy Duty Oil Tanned Genuine Leather Tool Belt, Dark Brown
description:
12 POCKET LEATHER TOOL BELT: Heavy duty leather tool belt features x4 large front pockets, x1 small center pocket, x2 hammer holders, one swivel and one fixed, and x6 smaller pockets, to carry your most important hand tools and accessories for any project

TOP QUALITY­ ­100% GENUINE LEATHER: High quality oil tanned leather tool belt features duty rivet reinforcements and double stitched corners for added strength; designed for long lasting performance, this tool belt is made to be used and while stiff upon arrival, will soften and relax with time and use

WIDE APPLICATION: This heavy tool belt is suitable for DIY projects at home, construction, electrical work, carpentry, wood working, framing and building, for plumbers, contractors and more; also makes a great gift for men, Dads, husbands, brothers, boyfriends and more!

ADJUSTABLE LEATHER TOOL BELT: Two inch wide webbing belt with double metal needles and roller buckle comes with 12 different size adjustments and can accommodate up to a 51 inch waist size

SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 24 x 10 x 3.0 inches; Belt Weight: 3.26lbs; Color: Dark Brown

Featuring top grain 100% genuine leather fabrication, easy waist belt adjustments (up to 51 inches) and twelve pockets for primary and secondary tool storage and organization, this oil tanned leather tool belt from ToolTreaux is made to be used, and is ready for any job or project.

Featuring x4 large front pockets, x1 smaller center pocket, x2 hammer holds (one fixed and one swivel), and x6 smaller pockets for pencils and other small accessories, this leather tool belt can carry your most used and valuable hand tools, eliminating multiple trips back to the shop, tool box or truck. Applicable within and for many different industries, the leather tool belt is suitable for at home DIY projects or home renovation, construction, electrical work, carpentry, wood working, framing and roofing, for plumbers, contractors and more.

The oil tanned leather tool belt features heavy duty rivet reinforcements and double stitched corners for extra added strength; designed for long lasting performance, this tool belt is made to be used and while stiff upon arrival, it will soften and relax with time and use. Expect all day comfort and stability with the tool belts adjustable belt with webbing and premium fabrication that molds to your person and your tools, making it reliable partner for every project.

Please Note: customization or personalization are not available for this item
